package.name: meca500_skill_server
package.description: Per-robot skill action server proxy for the Meca500. Hosts all 13 arm skill action servers in one process under the /meca500 namespace and publishes a single combined SkillManifest on /meca500_skill_server/skills. Phase 2 implementation: composes existing robot_arm_skills components via rclcpp_components::ComponentManager. Phase 4 will collapse the atoms into a library and merge the proxy + atoms into a single C++ Node that shares one MoveGroupInterface.
